title: TestCase
description: A structured test scenario that defines inputs, execution steps, and expected results to verify software functionality.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test case.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the test case.

description.description: Detailed description of what the test case verifies.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the test case.

priority.description: Priority level of the test case for execution ordering.

type.description: Category of testing performed by this test case.

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the test case can be executed.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps to execute the test case.

expected_result.description: The expected outcome when the test case is executed successfully.

actual_result.description: The actual outcome observed during test execution.

tags.description: Labels for categorizing and filtering test cases.

automation_status.description: Whether the test case is manual, automated, or planned for automation.

created_by.description: Username or identifier of the person who created the test case.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the test case was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the test case was last updated.

suite_id.description: Identifier of the test suite this test case belongs to.

requirement_refs.description: References to requirements or user stories this test case covers.

step_number.description: Ordinal position of this step in the test case.

action.description: The action to perform in this step.

expected_result.description: The expected result after performing this step.
